title: Cartes Bancaires (CB)
excerpt: Learn about Cartes Bancaires, a common payment method in France. Cartes Bancaires is France’s local card network. More than 95% of these cards are co-badged with either Visa or Mastercard, meaning you can process these cards over either Cartes Bancaires or the Visa or Mastercard networks. Businesses processing co-badged cards in the EEA must provide customers a choice of which network they prefer at checkout. Learn more in our [guide for co-badged cards compliance](https://docs.stripe.com/co-badged-cards-compliance.md). Cartes Bancaires can have a positive effect on your acceptance rate in France.…
